This question involves molar mass calculations and mole concept, which are fundamental topics in Class 11 Ch1, not purity of matter. Class 9 Ch2 deals with mixtures and pure substances, not quantitative calculations based on molar mass.

This question involves the mole concept and number of molecules/molar mass calculations, which are core topics in Class 11 Ch1 (Some Basic Concepts of Chemistry), not about purity of matter in Class 9 Ch2.

This question involves a galvanometer circuit with a potentiometer wire, which is an electrochemistry concept related to measurement of electromotive force and potential difference. It does not relate to atoms and molecules.
